name: Default Theme
intendedUse: the unskinned default — what a new app points at before a theme is chosen
description: Deliberately grayscale (zero chroma) so an unthemed app reads as clearly UNSKINNED, not finished. A true MID-gray canvas — not a dark theme, not a light/paper theme, the in-between — with lighter gray surfaces stepping up for elevation, near-black text and a dark charcoal highlight accent for high contrast. Mode is 'mid' on purpose: neither light nor dark, so the type renders at full weight and reads crisp. If your app is still gray, it hasn't been themed yet; swap the slug to skin it.
